questions.question_text: If someone doesn't wear a uniform to school, what do you think the teacher will say? Answer in the context of The Rebel.
questions.question_html: If someone doesn’t wear a uniform to school, what do you think the teacher will say? Answer in the context of The Rebel.

solutions.text: The teacher will scold the student and ask him/her the reason for not wearing the uniform and then takes action accordingly.
solutions.html: The teacher will scold the student and ask him/her the reason for not wearing the uniform and then takes action accordingly.

questions.question_text: When everyone wants a clear sky, what does the rebel want most? answer in the context of The Rebel.
questions.question_html: When everyone wants a clear sky, what does the rebel want most? answer in the context of The Rebel.

solutions.text: When everyone wants a clear sky, the rebel wants it to rain.
solutions.html: When everyone wants a clear sky, the rebel wants it to rain.

questions.question_text: If the rebel has a dog for a pet, what is everyone else likely to have?
questions.question_html: If the rebel has a dog for a pet, what is everyone else likely to have?

solutions.text: When everyone is likely to have a cat for a pet, only then will the rebel have a dog for a pet.
solutions.html: When everyone is likely to have a cat for a pet, only then will the rebel have a dog for a pet.

questions.question_text: Why is it good to have rebels?
questions.question_html: Why is it good to have rebels?

solutions.text: It is good to have rebels because very few people have the strength to stand against the majority. They think differently and stand fearlessly for their choices which can be beneficial.
solutions.html: It is good to have rebels because very few people have the strength to stand against the majority. They think differently and stand fearlessly for their choices which can be beneficial.

questions.question_text: Why is it not good to be a rebel oneself?
questions.question_html: Why is it not good to be a rebel oneself?

solutions.text: It is not good for oneself to be a rebel because you have to stand alone all the time. It makes you unpopular among the people and you will have no friends.
solutions.html: It is not good for oneself to be a rebel because you have to stand alone all the time. It makes you unpopular among the people and you will have no friends.

questions.question_text: Would you like to be a rebel? If yes, why? If not, why not?
questions.question_html: Would you like to be a rebel? If yes, why? If not, why not?

solutions.text: No, I would not like to be a rebel because I don't have the guts to oppose the majority and moreover I don't want to hurt the feelings of the people close to me. I don't want to be a source of bitterness among the people.
solutions.html: No, I would not like to be a rebel because I don't have the guts to oppose the majority and moreover I don't want to hurt the feelings of the people close to me. I don't want to be a source of bitterness among the people.

questions.question_text:
Find in the poem an antonym (a word opposite in meaning) for each of the following words. (The Rebel)
long ________
grow ________
quietness ________
sober ________
lost ________
questions.question_html:
Find in the poem an antonym (a word opposite in meaning) for each of the following words. (The Rebel)

  1. long ________
  2. grow ________
  3. quietness ________
  4. sober ________
  5. lost ________

solutions.text:
long - Short
grow - cut
quietness - disturbance
sober - fantastic
lost - find
solutions.html:
1. long - Short
  2. grow - cut
  3. quietness - disturbance
  4. sober - fantastic
  5. lost - find

questions.question_text:
Find in the poem an antonym (a word opposite in meaning) for each of the following words.. (The Rebel)
The rebel refuses to cut his hair.
He says cats are better.
He recommends dogs.
He is unhappy because there is no sun.
He is noisy on purpose.
questions.question_html:
Find in the poem an antonym (a word opposite in meaning) for each of the following words.. (The Rebel)

  1. The rebel refuses to cut his hair.
  2. He says cats are better.
  3. He recommends dogs.
  4. He is unhappy because there is no sun.
  5. He is noisy on purpose.

solutions.text:
The rebel lets his hair grow long.
He has a preference for cats.
He puts in a good word for dogs.
When everybody is greeting the rain.
When nobody talks during the lesson.
solutions.html:
1. The rebel lets his hair grow long.
  2. He has a preference for cats.
  3. He puts in a good word for dogs.
  4. When everybody is greeting the rain.
  5. When nobody talks during the lesson.
